description_long: This is a rectangular, two-shelf wooden cabinet or open shelf unit with a rich, reddish-brown wood grain finish. The structure is simple and modern, featuring clean lines and no visible hardware, doors, or decorative elements. The front is completely open, providing easy access to both shelf compartments, making it suitable for storing or displaying items. The sides and back are solid panels, matching the wood grain of the rest of the unit. The top surface is flat and can also serve as an additional support area for objects. Its robust build and open design make it ideal for use in urban environments such as public waiting areas, garages, or community spaces.
description: A rectangular, open wooden shelf unit with two spacious compartments and a rich reddish-brown finish. The design is modern, simple, and functional, with solid sides and back.
description_view_0: The front view shows two open shelves with a flat top and visible wood grain, highlighting the storage compartments.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid wood panel with no openings or features, emphasizing the thickness and grain of the material.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a solid back panel with a continuous wood grain, with no openings or hardware visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a solid wood panel with a consistent finish and no distinguishing features.
